mapper.select: select error_id, error_code, message, stack_trace, request_id, created_at from error_logs order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into error_logs (error_id, error_code, message, stack_trace, request_id, created_at) values (#{errorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stackTrace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
